compounddef.title: Dali_core_common
compounddef.innerclass: Dali::UniquePtr< Type, Deleter, typename EnableIf<!IsFunctionPointer< Deleter >::value >::type >

briefdescription.para: Dark green, useful for debugging visuals (texture / shader issues / culling etc.).
Method to log assertion message in DALI_ASSERT_ALWAYS macro below.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
location
Where the assertion occurred
condition
The assertion condition

briefdescription.para: Print backtrace log if required.

detaileddescription.para:
Do nothing if ENABLE_BACKTRACE option off.
@SINCE_2_3.2

memberdef.type: Pair< typename DecayType< T1 >::type, typename DecayType< T2 >::type >
memberdef.definition: Pair< typename DecayType< T1 >::type, typename DecayType< T2 >::type > Dali::MakePair
memberdef.name: MakePair

briefdescription.para: Creates a Pair from two values.

detaileddescription.para: It constructs a Pair efficiently with decayed types (removes references, const, volatile)

parameterdescription.para: The type of the first value
The type of the second value

simplesect.para: A Pair containing the two values with decayed types @SINCE_2_5.16

briefdescription.para: Swap function for Pair (enables ADL lookup). @SINCE_2_5.16.
Get the smaller value.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.8
lhs
The first value.
rhs
The second value.
T the smaller value.

briefdescription.para: Get the bigger value.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.8
lhs
The first value.
rhs
The second value.
T the bigger value.

briefdescription.para: Swap the value between left-hand-side and right-hand-side. It need move constructor and move assign.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.10
lhs
The first value.
rhs
The second value.

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the pointers point at the same object

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the pointers point at different objects

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
Object to compare against
True if the intrusive pointer points at the specified object

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the intrusive pointer doesn't point at the specified object

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
lhs
Object to compare with
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the intrusive pointer points at the specified object

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
lhs
Object to compare with
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the intrusive pointer doesn't point at the specified object

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects with nullptr_t.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_1.12
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
nullptr
True if the pointers is nullptr

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects with nullptr_t.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_1.12
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
nullptr
True if the pointers is not nullptr

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects with nullptr_t.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_1.12
lhs
nullptr
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the pointers is nullptr

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects with nullptr_t.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_1.12
lhs
nullptr
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the pointers is not nullptr

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_3.35
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the pointers point of rhs is bigger than lhs

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_3.35
lhs
Object to compare with
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the pointers point of rhs is bigger than lhs

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_3.35
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
Object to compare against
True if the pointers point of rhs is bigger than lhs

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

lhs
nullptr
rhs
Intrusive pointer to compare against
True if the pointers point of rhs is bigger than lhs

briefdescription.para: Comparison overrides of objects wrapped by intrusive pointers.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_3.35
lhs
Intrusive pointer to compare with
rhs
nullptr
True if the pointers point of rhs is bigger than lhs

briefdescription.para: Creates a SharedPtr that manages a new object. @SINCE_2_5.16.

parameterdescription.para: The type of the object to construct
The types of arguments to forward to the constructor
The arguments to forward to the constructor of Type

simplesect.para: SharedPtr<Type> managing the newly created object

memberdef.argsstring: (const SharedPtr< Type > &lhs, const SharedPtr< Type > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator==

briefdescription.para: Equality comparison operator for SharedPtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.16
Type
The type of object managed by the SharedPtr
lhs
The left-hand side SharedPtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side SharedPtr to compare
true if both SharedPtr objects are null or own the same pointer, false otherwise
This comparison is based on pointer address equality, not value equality of the managed objects.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SharedPtr< Type > &lhs, const SharedPtr< Type > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator!=

briefdescription.para: Inequality comparison operator for SharedPtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.16
Type
The type of object managed by the SharedPtr
lhs
The left-hand side SharedPtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side SharedPtr to compare
true if the SharedPtr objects manage different pointers, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const SharedPtr< Type > &lhs, const SharedPtr< Type > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator<

briefdescription.para: Less-than comparison operator for SharedPtr objects.

detaileddescription.para: Enables use of SharedPtr in ordered containers (e.g., map, set).

@SINCE_2_5.16
Type
The type of object managed by the SharedPtr
lhs
The left-hand side SharedPtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side SharedPtr to compare
true if lhs.Get() < rhs.Get(), false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const SharedPtr< Type > &lhs, const SharedPtr< Type > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator<=

briefdescription.para: Less-than-or-equal comparison operator for SharedPtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.16
Type
The type of object managed by the SharedPtr
lhs
The left-hand side SharedPtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side SharedPtr to compare
true if lhs.Get() <= rhs.Get(), false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const SharedPtr< Type > &lhs, const SharedPtr< Type > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator>

briefdescription.para: Greater-than comparison operator for SharedPtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.16
Type
The type of object managed by the SharedPtr.
lhs
The left-hand side SharedPtr to compare.
rhs
The right-hand side SharedPtr to compare.
true if lhs.Get() > rhs.Get(), false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SharedPtr< Type > &lhs, const SharedPtr< Type > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator>=

briefdescription.para: Greater-than-or-equal comparison operator for SharedPtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.16
Type
The type of object managed by the SharedPtr.
lhs
The left-hand side SharedPtr to compare.
rhs
The right-hand side SharedPtr to compare.
true if lhs.Get() >= rhs.Get(), false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Perfect forwarding helper function.

detaileddescription.para: Preserves the value category (lvalue/rvalue) of the argument when forwarding it to another function. This is a custom implementation of std::forward that doesn't depend on the standard library.
For lvalue references (Type&), the argument is forwarded as an lvalue. For rvalue references (Type&&), the argument is forwarded as an rvalue.

Type
The type of the forwarding reference
arg
The argument to forward
The argument with its value category preserved
@SINCE_2_5.11

briefdescription.para: Perfect forwarding helper function for rvalue references.

detaileddescription.para: Overload for rvalue references. When called with an rvalue argument, this overload is selected and forwards it as an rvalue.

Type
The type of the forwarding reference
arg
The argument to forward
The argument forwarded as an rvalue reference
@SINCE_2_5.11

briefdescription.para: Creates a UniquePtr that manages a new object. @SINCE_2_5.11.

parameterdescription.para: The type of the object to construct
The types of arguments to forward to the constructor
The arguments to forward to the constructor of Type

simplesect.para: UniquePtr<Type> managing the newly created object

memberdef.argsstring: (const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &lhs, const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator==

briefdescription.para: Equality comparison operator for UniquePtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.11
Type
The type of object managed by the UniquePtr
Deleter
The deleter type
lhs
The left-hand side UniquePtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side UniquePtr to compare
true if both UniquePtr objects are null or own the same pointer, false otherwise
This comparison is based on pointer address equality, not value equality of the managed objects.

memberdef.argsstring: (const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &lhs, const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator!=

briefdescription.para: Inequality comparison operator for UniquePtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.11
Type
The type of object managed by the UniquePtr
Deleter
The deleter type
lhs
The left-hand side UniquePtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side UniquePtr to compare
true if the UniquePtr objects manage different pointers, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &lhs, const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator<

briefdescription.para: Less-than comparison operator for UniquePtr objects.

detaileddescription.para: Enables use of UniquePtr in ordered containers (e.g., map, set).

@SINCE_2_5.11
Type
The type of object managed by the UniquePtr
Deleter
The deleter type
lhs
The left-hand side UniquePtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side UniquePtr to compare
true if lhs.Get() < rhs.Get(), false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &lhs, const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator<=

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.11
Type
The type of object managed by the UniquePtr
Deleter
The deleter type
lhs
The left-hand side UniquePtr to compare
rhs
The right-hand side UniquePtr to compare
true if lhs.Get() <= rhs.Get(), false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &lhs, const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator>

briefdescription.para: Greater-than comparison operator for UniquePtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.11
Type
The type of object managed by the UniquePtr.
Deleter
The deleter type.
lhs
The left-hand side UniquePtr to compare.
rhs
The right-hand side UniquePtr to compare.
true if lhs.Get() > rhs.Get(), false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &lhs, const UniquePtr< Type, Deleter > &rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator>=

briefdescription.para: Greater-than-or-equal comparison operator for UniquePtr objects.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_5.11
Type
The type of object managed by the UniquePtr.
Deleter
The deleter type.
lhs
The left-hand side UniquePtr to compare.
rhs
The right-hand side UniquePtr to compare.
true if lhs.Get() >= rhs.Get(), false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Print a String.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2.5.15
o
The output stream operator
string
The string to print
The output stream operator

briefdescription.para: Print a StringView.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2.5.19
o
The output stream operator
stringView
The string view to print
The output stream operator

briefdescription.para: Converts the value of the extents into a string and insert in to an output stream.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_2.62
stream
The output stream operator
extents
The Extents to output
The output stream operator
